pca9685_create.tooltip: Create PCA9685 servo driver object (16-channel PWM controller)

pca9685_set_freq.tooltip: Set PWM output frequency (servos usually use 50-60Hz)

pca9685_set_servo_angle.tooltip: Set the servo angle of the specified channel (0-180 degrees)

pca9685_set_pwm.message0: Set %1 channel %2 PWM value Start %3 End %4
pca9685_set_pwm.tooltip: Directly set PWM value (0-4095), for advanced users

pca9685_set_microseconds.tooltip: Set the pulse width (microseconds), the servo is usually 500-2500μs

pca9685_config_servo.message0: Configuration %1 Servo parameters Minimum PWM %2 Maximum PWM %3

pca9685_set_all_servos.tooltip: Set all 16 channels to the same angle

pca9685_set_servo_range.message0: Setting %1 Channel %2 Servo range Minimum angle %3 corresponds to PWM %4 Maximum angle %5 corresponds to PWM %6
pca9685_set_servo_range.tooltip: Customize the servo angle-PWM mapping relationship for a specific channel

pca9685_angle_to_pwm.tooltip: Convert the angle value to the corresponding PWM value
